Meta.Purpose: POTOP (Project Over-The-Top Power) is a 3D roguelite turret defense game with a multi-platform strategy (Mobile, PC, VR, Console).
Meta.Vision: Transitioning from a mobile-first local prototype to a globally connected ecosystem with a robust backend for ranking and cloud saves.

Directory.Description: Main game client built with Unity 6. Handles gameplay, rendering, and UI.
Server infrastructure for User Data, Global Leaderboards, and Cloud Save.
Directory.Context: Language: Django (Python) or NestJS (TypeScript). See potop_server/SUMMARY.xml for details.

Directory.Description: Centralized Game Design Documents (GDD) and roadmaps.

File.Description: Development roadmap and phased release plan
